title: malaxis stolleana
intro: Malaxis stolleana, also known as the Stollean's orchid or Stollean's malaxis, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Malaxis genus. It is a type of terrestrial orchid that is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties. Malaxis stolleana has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections, and it is often prepared as an infusion or tincture for its herbal remedies.
